The source files in this directory (include/, src/) are code generated by glad.
When changing the GL version or API configuration, regenerate and replace them using the following procedure.

- Generator: glad v2.0.4 (https://github.com/Dav1dde/glad)
- Generation arguments:

    python -m glad --out-path <output-dir> --api gl:core=4.3 --reproducible c --mx

- The web service (https://gen.glad.sh/) can also generate an equivalent configuration (gl:core=4.3, MX, reproducible, C/C++).
- With the --reproducible option, output generated from the same configuration is byte-for-byte identical.
- Local generation requires Python and jinja2 (pip install jinja2). These are not needed for a normal build.
